commit_scope: Convert ts-reversible-band.fk from a misdeclared raw BMF section into a form.action source section with TypeScript-BMF preludes and concrete BMF object/category checks, closing the final full-suite divergent row.

commands: COORD_AGENT=codex@a3ec ./scripts/agent-coord.sh claim "ts-reversible-band section-source residual after PR #2992: source-compiler leaves raw section [form.bmf] uncompiled/unbound; grok TypeScript-BMF claim is quiet 137h, so taking only this full-suite residual and will pivot if grok returns active."

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/tests/ts-reversible-band.fk
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/tests/ts-reversible-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused ts-reversible validation returns 105 across Go, Rust, and TypeScript after the source section is compiled through form.action and the test checks actual TypeScript-BMF NodeID categories. Full Form validation returns validate_rc=0 with fourth arm: 118 band(s) four-way, 551 ok, and 0 divergent. The fourth-arm manifest count is unchanged because this band is not yet listed for fkwu; the suite-level residual count is now zero. The metal-plane audit revalidated the current Form-native JIT lane proof plus macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF object receipts.

ci_validation.notes: Pending PR creation and GitHub checks.

commands: No public HTTP behavior change is expected; this is a Form source-section validation correction.
deploy_validation.notes: Android JIT support remains the Form-native recipe/table minimum floor. A compiler binary packaged inside an APK can be tracked later as optional measured acceleration or oracle evidence.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI, merge, and deploy validation are pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The ts-reversible source-section band now compiles through the high-level action dialect, loads the TypeScript-BMF grammar prelude explicitly, and proves 21 five-point TypeScript-BMF emit/source assertions at 105. Full Form validation now has zero divergent rows.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form validation; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Focused ts-reversible proof returns 105 across Go/Rust/TypeScript.
Full Form validation records 118 four-way bands, 551 ok, and 0 divergent rows.
